title: DWP complaints: Annual report by the Independent Case Examiner 2024 to 2025
body: "This report explains the Independent Case Examiner’s (ICE’s) work on Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) complaints received between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025.  Further information  The Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) has a complaints procedure.  If a complainant is unhappy with the final response from DWP, they can ask the Independent Case Examiner to investigate their complaint.  "
